tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
To be clear:

Oil is not up *because* of the business cycle.

Oil going up in a late business cycle environment poses a risk of ending the business cycle, especially when the reason it is going up is not because of demand. https://t.co/1xMRHuDKG4

tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
@AndreasSteno In a late business cycle environment (which is where I think we are right now based on liquidity), the rise of oil tends to occur before the business cycle ends. 

Energy prices in general make up about 7% of CPI, but because energy prices can swing rapidly (50% in a year), they https://t.co/UWX4oYixEa

tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
@AndreasSteno I have generally respected your views on the market and enjoyed hearing your takes.

I did not post anything above that was incorrect.

You have been bear posting oil the last few weeks (see your own tweets).

You have previously said that oil prices do influence the Fed (see

tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
@MajorMclaurin @AndreasSteno not entirely true
https://t.co/HFUFFsdHAd

tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
@JEUninformed @AndreasSteno you dont have to agree with it, that's fine.

and your interpretation of what I said is correct.

tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
@CRefutations @AndreasSteno exactly - we are already in a late business cycle environment, so the rise is oil prices is more concerning. If this were early business cycle, that would be different.

The current rise in oil prices is not responsible for everything else that has happened the last few months,

tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
@PatriotsCapital @CRefutations @AndreasSteno when did I say short time frame?

Nothing about macro is short time frame.

If oil prices continue to head higher, it will affect the Fed's reaction function.

The problem with this platform is that most people on here expect things to play out over a few weeks.

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
ByteDance has just secured another 500MW of compute capacity from local provider Vnet Group.

This is needed as Volcano Engine platform continues to see surging token demand w/ Seedance 2.0 being deployed. Generating 15s clip only costs 15RMB & uses ~309k tokens.

So, 10 million https://t.co/5mioJdLV4W

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Continues to amaze me these "experts" don't seem to appreciate that oil is a fungible commodity. Even w/ less worldwide supply, China still gets discounted oil paid in RMB vs its competitors in Europe & Japan.
https://t.co/EPYlVtyNXj

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD is planning to further expand its production out of Brazil's Bahia plant w/ goal of exporting from there to Mexico, Argentina, Uruguay & other nearby mkt.

This also helps BYD avoid some of the tariffs put on Chinese production. https://t.co/SSg90z3QKc

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Courtesy of Nikkei, Asian chip companies are benefiting from AI capex & increasing their own capex to meet the demand.

Not just in AI chips, but also memory & packaging/testing. https://t.co/8f5O75iyUx

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
ByteDance/Volcano Engine has also just signed contract w/ Transsion to bring Doubao models like SeeDream 4.0 & Seedance to its CAMON 50 series phones.

Transsion is huge across much of global south, so BD needs to expand its compute globally to support this.

BD is very vertical. https://t.co/nr04p4AFiH

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Spain's auto market for February should BYD increasing 203% YoY to 3003. Other Chinese brands:
DEEPAL 215, Ebro 2361, Jaecoo 806, Leapmtor 277, MG 3713, Omoda 2081, XPeng 112.
Both MG & Chery still sell more than BYD.
Atto 2 & Seal U were 2 of top 4 selling PHEV models. https://t.co/q29wfP1U9T

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Well I guess all the high end BYD Sedan are going to have 1000 km EV range from now on.

U7 2026 version will have 150kWh battery pack & significant improvement in efficiency. 150 kWh for 1006 km -> 15 kWh per 100 km for a D class sedan! https://t.co/7wWbvwavWm

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text: Long term trajectory is that of ByteDance/Doubao dominating AIGC mkt in global south mkt through not only Dola app, but also phones by Chinese OEMs, which have huge mkt share in Africa, Asia & Latam region.

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Iran was never going to sustain launch tempo of 1st 2 days, so those mass firings were to degrade US ISR & slow down its coalition tempo over time.

Iran will probably fire more drones & sophisticated BM from East in coming days.
https://t.co/DvO9AG5y0e

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
You cannot fire older BM at same rate from Western provinces bc they are being chased around & attacked everywhere. Obvious fatigue issues + losing TELs.

More damage to come from those cluster munition BMs + the cheaper & more accurate shaheds now that AD & ISR are degraded
